env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.reason: When set, the agent selects the default OpenAI Agents SDK model path. Exactly one of OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set, and OPENAI_API_KEY takes precedence when both are present.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.reason: When OPENAI_API_KEY is unset, the agent selects the litellm/anthropic/claude-sonnet-5 model path via this key. Exactly one of OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set.
